description_long: This is a modern residential house complex with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, surrounded by a wooden fence. The property features a main two-story house with large windows, a garage, and an attached carport. In the backyard, there is a spacious patio with outdoor seating, a round above-ground pool, a rectangular in-ground pool, and several small outbuildings or sheds. The landscaping includes a few trees and shrubs, and there are multiple dog kennels or animal enclosures along one side. The overall layout is open and organized, with clear separation between living, recreational, and utility areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a garage, pools, patio, and several outbuildings, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, garage with a car, and a tree-lined driveway.
description_view_1: Backyard view highlighting the patio, round pool, in-ground pool, and multiple animal enclosures.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the arrangement of pools, sheds, and the rear of the main house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, carport, and the fenced perimeter with visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, small steps, and a minimal overhang, with no ornate decorations.
